primary.$description: Primary interactive element color for CTAs, links, and key interactions

secondary.$description: Secondary interactive element color for less prominent interactions

success.$description: Color indicating successful state or positive feedback

error.$description: Color indicating error state or negative feedback

warning.$description: Color indicating warning state or caution

info.$description: Color indicating informational state or neutral message

default.$description: Default background color for main content areas

secondary.$description: Secondary background color for alternate sections

tertiary.$description: Tertiary background color for interactive elements

primary.$description: Primary text color for main content

secondary.$description: Secondary text color for supporting information
